spec.doc: StarTrack Label Specifications - Modify Your Own System (MOS) v9

rules.title: Premium receiver location codes
rules.description: Premium labels print RC=AU, R1 = Primary Port and R2 = Secondary Port from the Location Master File. The ports cannot be validated without the LMF, so confirm them on the preview.

messages.pass: Routing port segment present: {actual}. Confirm it matches the Primary Port for the receiver postcode in the Location Master File.
messages.missing: Routing port segment was not decoded. Confirm RC/R1/R2 values on the preview.
